creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for your submission Igor!

I spotted a few issues with your patch which would be great if you could fix it.

Please follow handbook template
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#using-cargo
PORTVERSION --> DISTVERSIONPREFIX + DISTVERSION and drop GH_TAGNAME

Can you submit your patch upstream (patch-src_hosts_paths.rs)?

Regards,
Daniel
